Hi Danilo! Happy Monday. How was last week for you?
Hi Rachel! It was busy. I finished the data report on Friday.
Nice! What else did you do?
On Tuesday, I fixed a big bug, and then I tested the new feature.
Great. Did you plan the next sprint too?
Yes, we planned it on Wednesday, and I organized all the files.
Good job. I reviewed your code on Thursday. It looked clean.
Thank you! Did you solve the problem with the dashboard?
Yes, I solved it on Friday, and I delivered my report to the manager.
Perfect. We worked hard last week!
Last week, I finished the data report.
I fixed the bug and tested the new feature.
We planned the sprint on Monday.
I delivered the project on time.
Did you solve the problem? Yes, I solved it on Friday.

Hi team, this is your weekly recap. Last week was a busy one, so let me tell you what we did. On Monday, we planned the new sprint together. On Tuesday, I fixed two bugs in the data pipeline, and Sofia tested the new feature. On Wednesday, we reviewed the code and solved a big problem with the reports. On Thursday, I organized all the project files. And on Friday, we finished everything and delivered the project on time. Great job, everyone. We worked hard, and we reached our goal. Have a great weekend, and see you on Monday!
